title: Paper A: No-Slack Obstruction
summary: Refutes the old no-slack support-wise line-MCA statement for smooth multiplicative Reed-Solomon domains.

title: Paper B: Slack, Quotient, and Entropy Theory
summary: Builds the corrected-reserve theory and adds the solved high-agreement line/list/curve boundary layer.

title: Paper C: SNARK and Protocol Ledger
summary: Separates protocol soundness accounting and adds a theorem-backed high-agreement ledger compiler.

title: Paper D: Universal Field-Size Cap and First-Grid Cap
summary: Proves the universal MCA threshold cap, extends the CA endpoint to the first closed grid point, and adds a large-row first-grid cap for the official rates.
